hero.title: Partner With FeRa Clinic (FR)
hero.subtitle: Join our network of trusted partners and collaborate with a premium dental clinic in Istanbul. Together, we can provide exceptional dental care to international patients. (FR)

whoCanApply.title: Who Can Apply (FR)
whoCanApply.subtitle: We welcome applications from established professionals and organizations in the medical tourism and healthcare industry. (FR)

coordination.title: Personalized Coordination (FR)

howItWorks.title: How It Works (FR)
howItWorks.subtitle: Our partnership process is designed to be transparent, efficient, and focused on building successful collaborations. (FR)

step1.title: Submit Partnership Request (FR)
step1.description: Complete our partnership application form with your details and collaboration interests. (FR)

step2.title: Our Team Reviews Your Profile (FR)
step2.description: Our partnership team carefully reviews your application and background for potential collaboration. (FR)

step3.title: We Contact You to Discuss Collaboration (FR)
step3.description: If there's a potential fit, we'll reach out to discuss partnership opportunities and next steps. (FR)

form.title: Partnership Application (FR)
form.subtitle: Ready to partner with us? Complete the form below and our partnership team will review your application. (FR)
form.companyNamePlaceholder: Enter your company or brand name (FR)
form.messagePlaceholder: Tell us about your partnership proposal and collaboration interests... (FR)
form.successDesc: Thank you for your interest in partnering with FeRa Clinic. Our team will review your application and contact you within 3-5 business days. (FR)
